cleavage agent: incubating the reaction mixture with trypsin (40 ng/μl of 25 mM NH4HCO3)
instrument: coupled to an LTQ-Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer
labeling: autophosphorylation of EhAK1 was measured as the amount of radioactivity incorporated
reduction reagent: 75 μl of 10 mM stock dithiothreitol was added
reduction concentration: 75 μl of 10 mM stock dithiothreitol was added
